## Description

- ✅ **Impact**: [How does it affect the app?]

## Type of Change
<!--- Check all that apply with [x] --->
- [ ] 🚀 Feature
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] 🎨 UI/UX polish
- [ ] 📦 Dependency update
- [ ] 📖 Documentation

## Verification
<!--- How did you test your changes? --->
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] Manual testing (screenshots/videos attached if UI change)
